SİPARİŞ TARİHİ YÜKLEME TARİHİ SİPARİŞ NO SİPARİŞ DURUMU DeliveryAddressCode DeliveryCityName TMSDespatchDocumentNo TMSDespatchDate OrderCreatedBy OrderCretedDate TMSVehicleRequestDocumentNo
{item.OrderDate?.split("T")[0] || "-"} {item.PickupDate?.split("T")[0] || "-"} {item.DocumentNo || "-"} {item.OrderStatu} {item.DeliveryAddressCode} {item.DeliveryCityName} {item.TMSDespatchDocumentNo || "-"} {item.TMSDespatchDate?.split("T")[0] || "-"} {item.OrderCreatedBy} {item.OrderCretedDate?.split("T")[0] || "-"} {item.TMSVehicleRequestDocumentNo}
); }; export default OdakDetailModal;
